name: Out of Love
overview: Meera begins to suspect every female associate of Akarsh, her husband after she found a stray hair which is not hers. After discussing with her friend, she thought she might be over reactive but does not stop digging up for finding the evidence.

trailers.title: Hotstar Specials Out Of Love 2 Official Trailer | Rasika Dugal | Purab Kohli | 30 April
